proof_policy.readback_is: operator evidence queue for regular options profitability proof work
proof_policy.readback_is_not: scanner promotion, broker recommendation, stop-policy change, live-entry approval, proof-bar reduction, or DB mutation
proof_policy.trusted_proof_standard: fresh executable exact OPRA/NBBO contract evidence for entry plus exact executable exit readback for realized P&L
